message.create_armed_arms.arm_already_ar: This mechanical arm is already armed.
message.create_armed_arms.not_enough_spa: No room to return the equipped weapon.
create_armed_arms.ponder.mechanical_arm_: Right-click the arm with a melee weapon to equip it
Empty-hand right-click disarms and returns the equipped weapon
Right-click the arm with a bow to equip ranged mode
Provide arrows on a depot as input ammo source
The arm consumes arrows from its input and fires at targets
It grabs one arrow and fires once
